errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer is not authorized for this instruction

errors.name: ReentrancyDetected
errors.msg: reentrancy detected — guard is already active

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: caller program is not on the allowed callers list

errors.name: CallerGuardNotActive
errors.msg: caller program's reentrancy guard is not active

errors.name: CpiDepthExceeded
errors.msg: cpi stack height exceeds allowed bound

errors.name: GuardNotInitialized
errors.msg: reentrancy guard has not been initialized

errors.name: AdminResetNotTimelocked
errors.msg: admin reset has not met the 24h timelock

errors.name: PoolMissing
errors.msg: dispute pool has not been snapshotted

errors.name: PoolTooSmall
errors.msg: dispute pool has too few eligible arbitrators

errors.name: RevealWindowOpen
errors.msg: reveal window has not closed yet

errors.name: CommitHashMismatch
errors.msg: commit hash does not match revealed data

errors.name: DuplicateVote
errors.msg: arbitrator has already voted in this round

errors.name: ArbitratorNotSelected
errors.msg: arbitrator was not selected for this case

errors.name: SlashAlreadyPending
errors.msg: a pending slash already exists for this arbitrator

errors.name: CallerNotTaskMarket
errors.msg: caller is not the task market program

errors.name: NotWithdrawing
errors.msg: arbitrator is not in withdrawing status

errors.name: WithdrawNotReady
errors.msg: withdraw unlock time has not been reached

errors.name: BadFaithThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: bad faith threshold not met for slash
